interact(KnowledgeKeepers) - Method in interface shot_boxes.ShotBoxes
Defines the interaction behavior when the player collides with this object.
interact(ShotBoxes) - Method in class player.Player
Increase score or decrease health according to actual type of shotBox, and the required line is written in the log file

Custom runtime exception thrown when an authentication attempt is invalid.
